source_jobs.title: Revenue Operations Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Restream is looking for a driven and ambitious Revenue Operations Specialist to join our Global Sales team based in Austin, Texas.

As the #1 multi-streaming solution, Restream enables organizations to communicate live with their customers across 20+ channels (YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok + more) with the click of a button. Our customers include Fortune 1000 businesses, Media Companies, Sports teams, Governments, Universities and Non-profits.

Restream was founded in 2015 and since then has seen incredible growth. Restream inspires over 11 million people worldwide to share their stories through live video and follow their dreams. We believe that a small but highly driven and focused team can make a lasting impact in people’s lives.

Many of the world’s most important organizations are already using Restream and that number is growing each day. We are building a Sales Organization to better partner with our growing B2B customer base. This is where you come in.

What You’ll Do

 - Support day-to-day revenue operations across Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, and Finance

 - Maintain clean, accurate data across our CRM and related business systems

 - Manage lead and account assignments, ownership updates, data audits, and routine system housekeeping

 - Support revenue-related workflows, documentation, approvals, and internal processes

 - Help prepare and maintain renewal documentation, order forms, and contract-related records

 - Track renewal dates and ensure renewal and new business information is accurate and up to date in the CRM

 - Build and maintain recurring reports and dashboards for pipeline activity, renewals, customer retention, and revenue performance

 - Support leadership with data gathering, reporting, and ad hoc analysis

 - Identify process gaps and recommend improvements that help teams work more efficiently

 - Assist with CRM updates, user administration, workflow changes, and system configuration requests

 - Support technology adoption, internal training, and documentation for go-to-market teams

 - Partner with Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, Finance, and other teams to improve operational alignment

 - Help develop and share best practices that improve the quality, consistency, and efficiency of our revenue processes
   

What We’re Looking For

 - 2+ years of experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Customer Success Operations, Sales Support, Business Operations, or a related role

 - Experience working with CRM platforms such as Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar systems

 - Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, or similar reporting tools

 - Strong organizational skills and excellent attention to detail

 - Ability to manage multiple priorities and follow through on operational tasks

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Comfortable working across departments and supporting multiple internal stakeholders

 - A process-driven mindset with the ability to identify issues and help improve workflows

 - Experience supporting reporting, dashboards, data audits, or revenue-related processes

 - A proactive, resourceful approach to solving problems and improving how teams work
   
   About You

 - You are highly organized and take pride in keeping data, systems, and processes accurate

 - You enjoy creating structure and helping teams operate more efficiently

 - You are detail-oriented, dependable, and comfortable working behind the scenes to keep things moving

 - You communicate clearly and work well with Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, Finance, and other internal teams

 - You are curious, proactive, and willing to dig into operational issues to understand what needs to improve

 - You care about building processes that help teams support customers, retain revenue, and grow the business


What We Offer

 - Competitive cash compensation and equity packages for you to truly be a part of the Restream journey

 - You will report dir

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer - AI Clips Team
source_jobs.description:
Restream is looking for a Design Engineer to develop the user interface of our product and build new marvelous features that not only function seamlessly but are also visually appealing and have an intuitive user experience. As a Design Engineer, your primary responsibility would be to ensure that our products and features are user-friendly, well-crafted, and provide value to our users.


As a member of our team, you will be at the forefront of ideating, developing, and shipping groundbreaking experiences. We believe in small teams where each member contributes significant value.




What You'll Do

 - Craft every detail of new product features, from an idea to design to the implementation

 - Design and implement the UI/UX and business logic necessary to support new and existing features

 - Build and iterate on features to drive user engagement and conversion

 - Collaborate closely with product, marketing, and customer support teams to define your features and contribute to the overall direction of your product area

 - Give and receive code review feedback with the team

 - Maintain a pulse on emerging technologies and discover hidden opportunities in our environment



What We Look For

 - Deep understanding of the UX design process and strategy

 - Attention to detail and strive for an excellent user experience

 - Proficient with Figma or any other design and prototyping tool

 - A strong portfolio of previous design projects

 - Knowledge of JavaScript, React, and at least one of React’s major state management systems

 - Comfortable working with Figma, React, TypeScript, MobX, AWS, and continuous deployment workflow

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Self-directed, analytical, and work well in a team environment

 - Passionate about the Restream product



Back in 2015, Restream http://restream.io was founded in Ukraine. We had a burning passion for helping creators to be seen and heard. As the #1 multistreaming solution, Restream inspires over 11 million people worldwide to share their stories through live video and follow their dreams. We believe that a small but highly driven and focused team can make a lasting impact in people's lives. 



What We Offer

 - A startup environment and a flat company structure

 - Work closely with founders and team to build and grow the product

 - Opportunity to make an impact on the evolution of the product

 - Ability to create something that influences people's lives

 - Equity packages for you to truly be a part of the Restream journey

 - The tech you need to get your job done

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Frontend - Studio Team
source_jobs.description:
Restream is looking for a Frontend Engineer to join us to solve complex challenges and build world-class products. In this role, you will build new features, develop the user interface of our product, and improve the reliability of our systems as we scale.

You will collaborate with a team of Engineers to drive processes and enhance user-facing features. You understand the importance of simplicity and reliability, and you calculate the impact of every decision on each. We believe in small teams where each member contributes significant value.



What You'll Do

 - Craft beautiful interfaces and interactions in Restream web services

 - Design and implement the UI and business logic necessary to support new and existing features

 - Partner with a product designer to build great and user-friendly UI/UX

 - Give and receive code review feedback with the team

 - Maintain a pulse on emerging technologies and discover hidden opportunities in our environment
   
   

What We Look For

 - A scrappy, entrepreneurial attitude that gets high-quality projects done quickly

 - Strong design sensibility, attention to detail, and strive for an excellent user experience

 - Solid knowledge of JavaScript, TypeScript, and newer specifications of ECMAScript (Experience with other programming languages is a plus)

 - Expert in React and its major state management systems

 - Experience with CSS preprocessors like LESS or SASS

 - Basic backend skills: Node.JS http://node.js/, building REST APIs, working with relational or NoSQL databases

 - Comfortable working with TypeScript, MobX, AWS, Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, continuous deployment workflow

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Self-directed, analytical, and work well in a team environment
   
   

Back in 2015, Restream http://restream.io/ was founded in Ukraine. We had a burning passion for helping creators to be seen and heard. As the #1 multistreaming solution, Restream inspires over 11 million people worldwide to share their stories through live video and follow their dreams. We believe that a small but highly driven and focused team can make a lasting impact in people's lives. 



What We Offer

 - A startup environment and a flat company structure

 - Work closely with founders and team to build and grow the product

 - Opportunity to make an impact on the evolution of the product

 - Ability to create something that influences people's lives

 - Equity packages for you to truly be a part of the Restream journey

 - The tech you need to get your job done

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Restream is looking for a driven and ambitious Customer Success Specialist to join our Global Sales team based in Austin, Texas.

As the #1 multi-streaming solution, Restream enables organizations to communicate live with their customers across 20+ channels (YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok + more) with the click of a button. Our customers include Fortune 1000 businesses, Media Companies, Sports teams, Governments, Universities and Non-profits.

Restream was founded in 2015 and since then has seen incredible growth. Restream inspires over 11 million people worldwide to share their stories through live video and follow their dreams. We believe that a small but highly driven and focused team can make a lasting impact in people’s lives.

Many of the world’s most important organizations are already using Restream and that number is growing each day. We are building a Sales Organization to better partner with our growing B2B customer base. This is where you come in.

What You'll Do

 - Serve as the primary point of contact for customers after go-live, owning the ongoing customer relationship and ensuring a smooth transition from implementation to long-term success.

 - Manage a book of business consisting of existing Restream customers on our self-serve and Enterprise plans.

 - Conduct regular customer check-ins to maintain strong relationships, understand evolving needs, and identify opportunities to improve customer outcomes.

 - Monitor account health, product adoption, usage trends, and key customer success indicators to proactively identify risks and opportunities.

 - Perform initial onboarding and adoption support for new customers, ensuring strong engagement throughout the customer lifecycle.

 - Partner with the Implementation Team when additional customer training, onboarding, or enablement is needed after go-live.

 - Act as the escalation point for ongoing customer issues, coordinating with Support, Billing, Technical teams, and other internal stakeholders to drive resolution.

 - Provide proactive strategy and guidance to assigned customer accounts to help them maximize value from Restream.

 - Maintain and grow the revenue base by managing retention, renewals, and expansion opportunities.

 - Identify and drive upsell or expansion opportunities

 - Work closely with Sales, Support, Billing, Implementation, and Technical teams to ensure an exceptional customer experience.

 - Develop and share best practices with team members to continually improve the quality, effectiveness, and efficiency of our processes.



What We Look For

 - Passionate about live streaming, content creation, video technology, and helping customers succeed in a fast-evolving industry.

 - Driven by a commitment to achieving customer success, with a focus on measurable results such as customer satisfaction, retention, and upsell opportunities

 - Efficiently manages multiple accounts, demonstrating excellent time management skills to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines

 - Possess strong phone, written and verbal communication skills with excellent presentation skills

 - Adaptable and flexible, capable of adjusting strategies to meet evolving customer expectations and industry trends

 - Proficient in analyzing customer data and key performance indicators to assess account health and make data-driven decisions

 - Confident, high energy, self-motivated and a true team player

 - Experience working with senior and executive level customer contacts
   
   What We Offer

 - Competitive cash compensation and equity packages for you to truly be a part of the Restream journey

 - You will report directly to our Chief Revenue Officer

 - A commitment to professional development and mentorship in your career

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Restream is looking for a driven and ambitious Account Executive to join our Global Sales team based in Austin, Texas.

As the #1 multi-streaming solution, Restream enables organizations to communicate live with their customers across 20+ channels (YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok + more) with the click of a button. Our customers include Fortune 1000 businesses, Media Companies, Sports teams, Governments, Universities and Non-profits.

Restream was founded in 2015 and since then has seen incredible growth. Restream inspires over 11 million people worldwide to share their stories through live video and follow their dreams. We believe that a small but highly driven and focused team can make a lasting impact in people’s lives.

Many of the world’s most important organizations are already using Restream and that number is growing each day. We are building a Sales Organization to better partner with our growing B2B customer base. This is where you come in.


What You'll Do

 - This is a hunter sales position. You will develop a robust pipeline and consistently exceed monthly new customer acquisition targets

 - Handle in-bound leads inquiring about Restream from first-contact to close

 - Identify and engage new potential clients through our self-serve user base (free and paid)

 - Creatively prospect for new customers that fit our Ideal customer profile

 - Handle the full-sales cycle from outreach, discovery, presentation, negotiation, and close, through a mix of email, social outreach, phone and video calls

 - Be the voice of our customers by identifying and representing their needs by collaborating with cross-functional teams

 - Become a Product expert, helping organizations across industries understand the value of live-streaming and teaching them to leverage Restream’s suite of products to hit their goals and communicate effectively with their target audiences

 - Help build the foundation of a world-class sales organization, influencing strategy, processes, and culture as we enter our next phase of growth


What We Look For

 - 3+ years in a quota-carrying hunter sales role with a track record of exceeding your number

 - Ambitious and results-oriented, with a strong desire to win and a commitment to creating value for customers along the way

 - Strong communicator who builds trust quickly and develops meaningful relationships

 - Naturally curious, thoughtful, and strategic driven to deeply understand customers, industries, and business challenges so you can engage prospects with relevance and purpose

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where experimentation, learning, and continuous improvement are valued

 - Experience with SaaS, live-streaming and/or video content creation either as an individual or in a business setting is a plus


What We Offer

 - An opportunity to sell a best-in-class SaaS product at the intersection of media and tech to the most important businesses and organizations in the world

 - Competitive cash compensation and equity packages for you to truly be a part of the Restream journey

 - You will report directly to our Chief Revenue Officer

 - A commitment to professional development and mentorship in your career

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Backend - AI Clips Team
source_jobs.description:
Restream is looking for a Backend Engineer to join us to solve complex challenges and build world-class products. In this role, you will build new features, design and implement new services, and improve the reliability of our systems as we rapidly scale our product and organization. You understand the importance of simplicity and reliability, and you calculate the impact of every decision on each. We believe in small teams where each member contributes significant value.



What You'll Do

 - Develop and maintain features in Restream web services

 - Design and implement backend APIs and business logic necessary to support new and existing features

 - Give and receive code review feedback with the team

 - Maintain a pulse on emerging technologies and discover hidden opportunities in our environment

 - Ensure redundancy and resilience of Restream production infrastructure.



What We Look For

 - A scrappy, entrepreneurial attitude that gets high-quality projects done quickly

 - Expert in at least one general-purpose programming language

 - Node.JS (TypeScript) or Rust would be a plus but are not a requirement

 - Highly proficient in database design, with both relational and NoSQL (Scylla, Redis) databases

 - Experience with creating, testing, consuming, and supporting APIs for web services

 - Comfortable working with AWS, Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, continuous deployment workflow, multiple programming languages tech stack

 - Basic front-end skills

 - Experience with modern front-end frameworks is a plus

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Self-directed, analytical, and work well in a team environment.
   

Back in 2015, Restream was founded in Ukraine. We had a burning passion for helping creators to be seen and heard. As the #1 multistreaming solution, Restream inspires over 11 million people worldwide to share their stories through live video and follow their dreams. We believe that a small but highly driven and focused team can make a lasting impact on people’s lives.



What We Offer

 - A startup environment and a flat company structure

 - Work closely with founders and team to build and grow the product

 - Opportunity to make an impact on the evolution of the product

 - Ability to create something that influences people's lives

 - Equity packages for you to truly be a part of the Restream journey

 - The tech you need to get your job done

notes: Strong engineering core, with multiple frontend and backend engineer roles. Some GTM roles, but engineering dominates.
